name: triage-os
description: Intelligent task orchestration with 4 specialized agents

scripts.ultracode:execute: node -e "const CoreOSScheduler = require('./src/core/scheduler'); const scheduler = new CoreOSScheduler(); scheduler.executeUltracode('Execute Phase 1 all workflows').then(r => { console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)); process.exit(r.status === 'PRODUCTION_READY' ? 0 : 1); }).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.ultracode:w1: node -e "const CoreOSScheduler = require('./src/core/scheduler'); const scheduler = new CoreOSScheduler(); scheduler.executeUltracode('git healing').then(r => { console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });"
